title: Jenny Rub
compiled_truth: Jenny Rub is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-14 to 2002-02-13), Jenny Rub sent 26 and received 280 emails, totalling 306 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (13), [Greg Piper](people/greg-piper) (11), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (7), [Mark Pickering](people/mark-pickering) (6), [Beth Perlman](people/beth-perlman) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, bankruptcy, deleted_items, inbox, old_inbox.
